/home/admin/effcc/bin/effcc -O3 --target=e1x -DHW_BUILD -flto -DE1_TARGET CMakeFiles/hum_sentinel_fabric.dir/main.c.o CMakeFiles/hum_sentinel_fabric.dir/detector.c.o CMakeFiles/hum_sentinel_fabric.dir/dsp.c.o CMakeFiles/hum_sentinel_fabric.dir/fft_tables.c.o CMakeFiles/hum_sentinel_fabric.dir/protocol.c.o CMakeFiles/hum_sentinel_fabric.dir/hal_e1.c.o -o fabric/hum_sentinel  sdk/stdlib/libeff.a sdk/drivers/uart/scalar/libeff_eff_drv_uart.a sdk/drivers/pinmux/scalar/libeff_eff_drv_pinmux.a sdk/drivers/i2c/scalar/libeff_eff_drv_i2c.a sdk/drivers/gpio/scalar/libeff_eff_drv_gpio.a sdk/drivers/spi/scalar/libeff_eff_drv_spi.a
